# Wes Jones — Lead Product Designer

> Lead Product Designer with more than 20 years of experience leading and mentoring digital product teams across fintech, healthcare, travel, and enterprise software. Specializes in designing agentic systems and purpose-built interaction patterns that make it easier for people to work with AI and solve complex problems.

Website: https://wesjones.info
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wes-jones-a0914312/
Email: wes@jonesco.com
Phone: 512-944-8513
Resume: https://wesjones.info/images/Wes_Jones_Resume.pdf

## About

Wes Jones is a Lead Product Designer who empathizes with users, understands challenges, concepts solutions, builds prototypes, tests, iterates, and delivers. He creates thoughtful, effective experiences that meet real human needs and drive business outcomes. Lately focused on designing agentic systems and AI interaction patterns.

## Core Skills

- **Visionary**: Uses curiosity to learn all aspects of a problem, decides which issues need to be fixed (and in what order), and creates bulletproof solutions.
- **Creative**: Finds the balance between imagination and logic, developing designs that delight and perform.
- **Organizer**: Defines design patterns and documents components for consistency in how a product looks and functions.
- **Builder**: Creates pixel-perfect designs and prototypes that allow for quick answers and identify unknown problems.
- **Mentor**: Guides teams to challenge assumptions and sharpen skill sets.

## Selected Case Studies

### Fund Manager Workspace
**Client**: One of the world's top investment banks managing over $11 trillion in assets
**Role**: Sole product designer
**Summary**: Modernized and united a disparate group of applications into a unified platform. Collaborated with business team and subject matter experts to redesign features, enhancing efficiency in cash allocation, asset rebalancing, and trade recommendations at an Agile pace. Designed over a dozen robust features tailored to specialized financial workflows, reducing clicks, minimizing repetitive actions, and providing dynamic feedback.
**Challenges solved**: Faster task completion through efficient workflows; smarter automated interfaces; better collaboration and transparency; intuitive software combining business procedures across teams.
URL: https://wesjones.info/fund-manager

### Netspend Pattern Library
**Client**: Netspend (fintech — prepaid debit, banking services, paycard solutions)
**Role**: Lead designer — conceptualized, defined, directed, and approved final design
**Summary**: Built a comprehensive Figma-based pattern library to address inconsistency in user experience. Engineered a Sticker Sheet component library that powers the pattern library. Organized patterns using Atomic Design Methodology (Principles, Basics, Components, Layouts, Features). First comprehensive pattern library in Netspend's history. Improved productivity, consistency, and developer-designer communication.
URL: https://wesjones.info/ns_pattern_library

### Custom Debit Card Creator
**Client**: Netspend
**Role**: Concept originator, UX/UI designer
**Summary**: After visiting the Visa Innovation Studio in NYC, conceived and designed a feature allowing users to customize their debit card art using emoji. Simple pinch/zoom/rotate interface borrowed from popular social apps. Designed to drive customer retention — research showed customers active for two months remain for at least a year. Eliminated asset costs by using public domain emoji art.
URL: https://wesjones.info/custom_card_creator

### Wayblazer Search Platform
**Client**: Wayblazer (travel technology startup)
**Role**: Consultant — UX lead, art direction, prototypes
**Summary**: Designed a smart travel search experience using IBM Watson AI APIs that could predict trip type (family vs. business) and suggest activities. Designed for seamless white-label integration inside third-party sites. Created fully responsive layouts across all form factors and device orientations.
URL: https://wesjones.info/wayblazer

### MagicStaff POC
**Client**: Internal proof of concept
**Role**: UX/UI designer — user interviews, prototyping, user testing
**Summary**: Built in one month, MagicStaff is a developer staffing solution for global teams powered by Google OR-Tools optimization. Generates weighted staffing assignment recommendations accounting for skill trees, upskilling goals, schedule, workload, and worker preferences. Includes employee skill tree profiles, admin notes, and a calendar view showing staffing impact company-wide.
URL: https://wesjones.info/magicstaff

### CPay Sales Assistant Workshop
**Client**: Central Payment Corporation (merchant account provider)
**Role**: Design lead and sprint facilitator
**Summary**: Hosted a 4-day Google Ventures Design Sprint with Central Payment Corporation's sales team to design a unified sales assistant tool. Facilitated sketching sessions, storyboarding, and delivered a polished high-fidelity clickable prototype using Ionic Platform resources — all within four days.
URL: https://wesjones.info/cpay

### SpotMe Lending Concept
**Client**: Netspend (in partnership with IDEO)
**Role**: Primary Netspend design liaison and lead
**Summary**: Partnered with IDEO to conduct ethnographic research, at-home interviews, and design thinking workshops with real users. Discovered that peer-to-peer lending was a key unaddressed use case. Ran a 3-day Google Design Sprint to concept the feature, then designed and executed a user test using an App Store-style explainer prototype. User testing revealed the concept was not viable, saving the company thousands of dollars in development costs. A successful failure.
URL: https://wesjones.info/spotme

### Wellsmith Web Portal & Mobile App
**Client**: Wellsmith (health & wellness)
**Role**: Product designer
**Summary**: Designed a healthcare compliance ecosystem tracking patients' medication, activity, nutrition, and vitals. Includes a web-based physician portal allowing clinicians to monitor large patient populations and offer real-time expertise, plus an individualized patient mobile app with reminders and care plan baselines.
URL: https://wesjones.info/wellsmith
